question: 姓张的客户有哪些
sql: SELECT user_id, username, nickname FROM users WHERE nickname LIKE '张%'

question: 花名里带"大"的客户有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE nickname LIKE '%大%'

question: 有多少用户绑定了邮箱
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != ''

question: 电子邮件以qq.com结尾的买家有哪些
sql: SELECT user_id, username, email FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@qq.com'

question: VIP等级为5的会员有多少人
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE user_level = 5

question: 等级最高的前10名客户是谁
sql: SELECT user_id, username, user_level FROM users ORDER BY user_level DESC LIMIT 10

question: 注册日期在2024年1月的买家有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE DATE_FORMAT(register_time, '%Y-%m') = '2024-01'

question: 可用余额超过1000元的客户有哪些
sql: SELECT user_id, username, balance FROM users WHERE balance > 1000 ORDER BY balance DESC

question: 城市为上海的用户有多少个收货地址
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_addresses WHERE city = '上海'

question: 各区县分别有多少个收货地址
sql: SELECT district, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_addresses WHERE district IS NOT NULL GROUP BY district ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: 收件人叫"张三"的地址有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_addresses WHERE receiver_name = '张三'

question: 具体地址中包含"小区"的有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_addresses WHERE detail_address LIKE '%小区%'

question: 有多少用户设置了默认地址
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_addresses WHERE is_default = 1

question: 各级行政区划分别有多少地址
sql: SELECT province, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_addresses GROUP BY province ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: 类目名叫"手机通讯"的分类信息
sql: SELECT category_id, category_name, parent_id FROM categories WHERE category_name = '手机通讯'

question: 包含"数码"关键字的品类名有哪些
sql: SELECT category_id, category_name FROM categories WHERE category_name LIKE '%数码%'

question: 上级分类为空的顶级类目有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NULL

question: 第一层级和第二层级的分类各有多少个
sql: SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM categories GROUP BY level

question: 产品名中包含"蓝牙耳机"的货品有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM products WHERE product_name LIKE '%蓝牙耳机%'

question: 商品名以"OPPO"开头的有哪些
sql: SELECT product_id, product_name, price FROM products WHERE product_name LIKE 'OPPO%'

question: 属性名为"颜色"的规格有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM product_specs WHERE spec_name = '颜色'

question: 参数值为"黑色"的规格涉及哪些商品
sql: SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM product_specs WHERE spec_value = '黑色'

question: 店名包含"旗舰"的店铺有哪些
sql: SELECT store_id, store_name, store_type FROM stores WHERE store_name LIKE '%旗舰%'

question: 每个店主的店铺数量是多少
sql: SELECT owner_id, COUNT(*) AS store_count FROM stores GROUP BY owner_id ORDER BY store_count DESC

question: 评价内容包含"好评"的有几条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM store_ratings WHERE content LIKE '%好评%'

question: 订单号以"2024"开头的交易有多少笔
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders WHERE order_no LIKE '2024%'

question: 备注不为空的订单有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders WHERE remark IS NOT NULL AND remark != ''

question: 付款时间在2024年6月的订单总金额是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(pay_amount) AS total FROM orders WHERE DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, '%Y-%m') = '2024-06' AND order_status != 'cancelled'

question: 流水号以"WX"开头的支付记录有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payments WHERE payment_no LIKE 'WX%'

question: 运单号以"SF"开头的包裹有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM shipments WHERE shipment_no LIKE 'SF%'

question: 快递单号以"YT"开头的物流信息有哪些
sql: SELECT shipment_id, shipment_no, carrier, status FROM shipments WHERE shipment_no LIKE 'YT%'

question: 寄件人"张仓库"发出了多少个包裹
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM shipments WHERE sender_name = '张仓库'

question: 经过北京市的物流轨迹有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM shipment_tracks WHERE location LIKE '%北京%'

question: 券名包含"满减"的优惠券有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM coupons WHERE coupon_name LIKE '%满减%'

question: 各券类型的优惠券数量
sql: SELECT coupon_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM coupons GROUP BY coupon_type

question: 活动名称包含"双11"的促销有几个
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, campaign_type FROM campaigns WHERE campaign_name LIKE '%双11%'

question: 2024年1月的领券记录有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_coupons WHERE DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m') = '2024-01'

question: 最近7天的领券记录有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_coupons WHERE receive_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

question: 各月的成交总额是多少
sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(pay_amount) AS total_gmv FROM orders WHERE order_status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'refunding') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

question: 2024年全年的成交额是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(pay_amount) AS total_gmv FROM orders WHERE YEAR(create_time) = 2024 AND order_status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'refunding')

question: 各商户的人均消费是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, ROUND(SUM(pay_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 2) AS avg_per_user FROM orders WHERE order_status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'refunding') GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY avg_per_user DESC

question: 各店铺的回头率是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS total_users, SUM(CASE WHEN order_cnt >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS repeat_users, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN order_cnt >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS repeat_rate FROM (SELECT store_id, user_id, COUNT(*) AS order_cnt FROM orders WHERE order_status NOT IN ('cancelled') GROUP BY store_id, user_id) t GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY repeat_rate DESC

question: 各商户的动态评分平均水平是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, ROUND(AVG(description_score), 2) AS avg_desc, ROUND(AVG(service_score), 2) AS avg_service, ROUND(AVG(logistics_score), 2) AS avg_logistics FROM store_ratings GROUP BY store_id

question: 各优惠券的使用率是多少
sql: SELECT coupon_id, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_cnt, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS usage_rate FROM user_coupons GROUP BY coupon_id ORDER BY usage_rate DESC

question: 各活动的投资回报率排名
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, cost, actual_gmv, ROUND(actual_gmv / NULLIF(cost, 0), 2) AS roi FROM campaigns WHERE cost > 0 ORDER BY roi DESC

question: 各快递公司的投递成功率是多少
sql: SELECT carrier, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivered, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS success_rate FROM shipments GROUP BY carrier ORDER BY success_rate DESC

question: 收到了的订单有多少笔
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'received'

question: 已收货的订单总金额是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(pay_amount) AS total FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'received'

question: 还没付款的订单有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'pending'

question: 未付款超过3天的订单有哪些
sql: SELECT order_id, order_no, create_time FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'pending' AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(create_time)) > 3

question: 发货了但还没收到的订单有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'shipped'

question: 取消了的活动有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM campaigns WHERE status = 'cancelled'

question: 今年取消了多少笔订单
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'cancelled' AND YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE())

question: 用微信付款的订单有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payments WHERE payment_method = 'wechat' AND payment_status = 'success'

question: 用银行卡支付的金额是多少
sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total FROM payments WHERE payment_method = 'bank_card' AND payment_status = 'success'

question: 选择分期付款的订单平均金额是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_amount FROM payments WHERE payment_method = 'installment' AND payment_status = 'success'

question: 搞限时抢购的活动有哪些
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, start_time, end_time FROM campaigns WHERE campaign_type = 'flash_sale'

question: 搞团购的促销活动有多少个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM campaigns WHERE campaign_type = 'group_buy'

question: 免邮的优惠券有几种
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM coupons WHERE coupon_type = 'shipping'

question: 免运费的券还有多少没过期
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM coupons WHERE coupon_type = 'shipping' AND end_time > CURDATE()

question: 打折类型的券最低打几折
sql: SELECT MIN(discount_value) AS min_discount FROM coupons WHERE coupon_type = 'percent'

question: 发顺丰速运的包裹有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM shipments WHERE carrier = 'sf'

question: 京东物流的签收率是多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivered, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS rate FROM shipments WHERE carrier = 'jd'

question: 平台上有多少家旗舰店
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stores WHERE store_type = 'flagship'

question: 个人店铺有多少家在营业
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stores WHERE store_type = 'personal' AND status = 'open'

question: 正在预售的商品有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM products WHERE status = 'pre_sale'

question: 已经下架的货品有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM products WHERE status = 'off_sale'

question: 被封禁的账号有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE status = 'banned'

question: 未激活的买家有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE status = 'inactive'

question: 已经停用的券有几个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM coupons WHERE status = 'disabled'

question: 过期的用户券有多少张
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_coupons WHERE status = 'expired'

question: 手机通讯类目下有哪些商品
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.price FROM products p INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.category_name = '手机通讯'

question: 移动设备类目的平均售价是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(p.price), 2) AS avg_price FROM products p INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.category_name = '手机' AND p.status = 'on_sale'

question: 顾客一共下了多少单
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled'

question: 每个客户的首次下单时间
sql: SELECT user_id, MIN(create_time) AS first_order_time FROM orders WHERE order_status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY first_order_time

question: 卖家数量最多的省份是哪里
sql: SELECT province, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stores GROUP BY province ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

question: 最近一个月发了多少快递
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM shipments WHERE DATE(create_time) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

question: 运输中的包裹有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM shipments WHERE status IN ('picked_up', 'in_transit')

question: 折扣券的使用率比固定金额券高吗
sql: SELECT coupon_type, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_cnt, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN uc.status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS usage_rate FROM user_coupons uc INNER JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id GROUP BY coupon_type ORDER BY usage_rate DESC

question: 正在进行中的促销有哪些
sql: SELECT campaign_id, campaign_name, campaign_type FROM campaigns WHERE status = 'active'

question: 每个店铺的反馈平均分是多少
sql: SELECT store_id, ROUND(AVG(description_score), 2) AS avg_desc, ROUND(AVG(service_score), 2) AS avg_service FROM store_ratings GROUP BY store_id

question: 今年的交易总笔数是多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM orders WHERE YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE())
